//: Deno config for the edge functions ONLY. The app's tsconfig deliberately excludes supabase/* (Deno globals + npm: specifiers would break the Expo build), which left ai-service/index.ts with NOTHING typechecking it — a typo there is invisible until it 500s in production. `npm run check:edge` closes that gap. The _shared modules are pure TS and are covered by the normal vitest gate.
